title: Xylem 2025 Annual Report on Form 10-K
note: Primary source for 2025 revenue, operating income, margins, installed-base framing, product portfolio, and water-industry risk context.

title: Xylem Investors
note: Investor-relations source for company positioning, stock information, and access to the 2025 annual report.

title: Flygt Submersible Pumps, Mixers and Wastewater Solutions
note: Product source for Flygt wastewater pumps, dewatering pumps, adaptive mixers, parts, pump controls, monitoring, service, and market applications.

title: Sensus Home
note: Product source for Sensus smart utility technologies, meters, FlexNet communications, analytics, and utility infrastructure positioning.

title: Sensus Smart Water
note: Product source for Sensus smart water meters, FlexNet water communications, Sensus Analytics, district metering, pressure profiling, and utility data use cases.

title: Sensus Smart Grid
note: Product source for Sensus smart-grid communications, analytics, advanced metering infrastructure, distribution automation, and demand-response context.

title: Xylem Market Capitalization
note: Market-data source for Xylem market capitalization and share-price snapshot.

title: Xylem P/E Ratio
note: Market-data source for Xylem trailing P/E ratio.

title: OpenPLC GitHub Repository
note: Open-source industrial controller repository used as a pump-station control-stack alternative and decentralization enabler.

title: EPANET
note: Official EPA source for EPANET water distribution modeling, pump scheduling, energy use, hydraulic analysis, and open-source project context.

title: OpenWaterAnalytics EPANET
note: Public source repository for the EPANET hydraulic and water-quality analysis toolkit.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric - LF Energy
note: Open-source project source for field-device monitoring and control across microgrids, smart metering, public lighting, and distribution automation.

title: Grid eXchange Fabric GitHub Organization
note: Public repository source for GXF code, formerly known as Open Smart Grid Platform.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor System Overview
note: Documents the open-source hardware and software stack for local energy monitoring, data logging, visualization, and meter integrations.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor GitHub Organization
note: Public source repositories for OpenEnergyMonitor hardware, firmware, and software projects.

title: OpenADR Alliance
note: Technical standard source for automated demand response, distributed energy resources, and secure two-way smart-grid information exchange.
